meta.title: Project status — Acme integration
meta.subtitle: RAG: Yellow — integration risk with system B

sections.title: Executive summary
sections.body_markdown:
**Yellow:** On track for **GA Sept 1** with scoped MVP; primary risk is **real-time sync** with **system B**. Mitigation is **batch-first** GA with streaming in **Q4**. Steering committee locked **scope cut** on batch mode **April 15**.

Stakeholders: **product**, **sales**, **legal** (vendor DPA signed).

sections.title: Milestones
sections.body_markdown:
| Milestone | Target | Status | Notes |
|-----------|--------|--------|-------|
| Design sign-off | May 1 | Done | Figma linked below |
| API beta | June 15 | In progress | 3/5 pilot clients integrated |
| GA | Sept 1 | On track | Load test window July |
| Streaming GA | Dec 1 | Planning | Depends on GA stability |

sections.title: Risks & mitigations
sections.body_markdown:
| Risk | L / I | Mitigation | Owner |
|------|-------|------------|-------|
| Partner API breaking change | M / H | Version pin + contract tests | @dana |
| Key engineer OOO July | L / M | Cross-train + runbook | @eli |

sections.title: Needs from leadership
sections.body_markdown:
- **Decision by June 1:** fund second contractor for **integration** hardening or slip GA by **4 weeks**.
- **Sponsor** for vendor negotiation — intro to **Acme** enterprise account team.
- **Air cover** if we pause **nice-to-have** UI polish until beta completes.
